todos.content: Create docs/system/ folder structure with all subdirectories for VirtualGfriend
Create authentication/ files (overview, auth-flow, rate-limiting, premium-gating)
Create database/ files (schema-overview, user-models, character-models, chat-models, gamification-models, payment-models)
Create ai-engine/ files (system-prompt, character-personality, emotion-detection, memory-system)
Create frontend/ files (routing, state-management, real-time, api-client, components)
Create backend/ files (routes, middleware, socket-handlers, modules)
Create gamification/ files (quests, gifts-shop, levels-affection, scenes, memories, leaderboard, daily-rewards)
Create security/ files (auth-security, rate-limiting, input-validation, data-protection)
Create data-flows/ files (registration-flow, chat-flow, dm-flow, purchase-flow)
Create deployment/ files (env-vars, docker-setup, ci-cd, nginx-config)
Update CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md to reference new structure
Double-check: verify all files exist, links work, content accurate
